role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on script analysis (Hiragana/Katakana) and place-name etymology.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color, and settlement patterns without overstepping into regulatory specifics.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed vegetation morphology and agricultural layout consistent with its domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (utility poles, drainage gutters) and road width.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture + infrastructure) to distinguish between similar East Asian candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. The linguistic agent provided a definitive 'smoking gun' (Japanese script) that anchored the correct country, while the other agents provided strong corroborating evidence regarding infrastructure and architecture. The tournament correctly prioritized the linguistic evidence to resolve the Japan vs. South Korea ambiguity.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified visible Japanese characters on the white building.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the tilled soil, narrow road, and rural layout.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly noted the small-scale vegetable plots and background trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the concrete utility poles and integrated drainage gutters.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the specific architectural style of the house on the right.
